eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 8:46 PM on JUL 1, 2019 Effective until 6:46 AM JUL 2, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for Mesa PD in Maricopa County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  Mesa PD is looking for female Ruth Mack last seen Southern and Hawes possibly driving a black 2 0 0 6 Honda C R V Arizona plate A C 0 4 7 6. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 911.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
